zh.Elmore, Stroud district, Gloucestershire: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德
zh.Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Walsh於1485年出生在英國武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什時，他的父親John Welsche35歲，母親Margaret le Blount33歲。他於1502年與Ann Alice Baynham在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年11月在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德。

zh-hans.Elmore, Stroud district, Gloucestershire: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德
zh-hans.Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Walsh于1485年出生在英国武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什时，他的父亲John Welsche35岁，母亲Margaret le Blount33岁。他于1502年与Ann Alice Baynham在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年11月在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德。

nameMeanings.name: Walsh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Dermot, John Patrick, Kieran, Declan, Eamonn, Colm, Donal, Seamus, Siobhan, Brennan.

English and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English walshe (Old English wælisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’. This form of the name was generally more common than Welsh , especially in Ireland, where it originally denoted a Welsh-speaking immigrant, in particular any of the Welshmen who arrived in the wake of Strongbow's Anglo-Norman invasion of 1170. In Ireland it is sometimes also a translation of Breathnach ‘Briton’.
English: in Yorkshire and Lancashire the name is sometimes a shortened form of   Walshaw  .

variants.name: Walshe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eoin, Murph.
English and Irish: variant of   Walsh  .

variants.name: McBratney
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Breatnaigh ‘son of the Briton’ (referring to the Welsh of Strathclyde). Compare Walsh and Galbraith .

variants.name: Welsh
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English welshe (Old English wēalisc, wēlisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’, for someone from Wales or a speaker of the Welsh language. Compare Walsh and Wallace .
Americanized form of Ukrainian and Jewish (from Ukraine) Voloshin or its Polish variant Wołoszyn (see Woloszyn ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Walsh was born in 1485, in Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England, his father, John Welsche, was 35 and his mother, Margaret le Blount, was 33. He married Ann Alice Baynham in 1502, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in November 1558, in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Walsh est né en 1485, à Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Welsche, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret le Blount, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Ann Alice Baynham en 1502, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1558, à Stroud, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Stroud, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Walsh 1485 in Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Welsche 35 und seine Mutter Margaret le Blount 33. Er hat 1502 in Gloucestershire, England Ann Alice Baynham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb im November 1558 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Walsh è nato il nel 1485 nel Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John Welsche, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margaret le Blount, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Ann Alice Baynham nel 1502, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1558, nel Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアシェルスリー ワルッシュ
ja.lifeSummary: John Walshが1485年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアシェルスリー ワルッシュで生まれた時，父John Welscheは35歳，母Margaret le Blountは33歳であった。1502年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでAnn Alice Baynhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年11月にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストロウドで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストロウドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Walsh(이)가 1485년 영국 워스스터실르 셸슬리 월시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Welsche(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret le Blount(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1502년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Ann Alice Baynham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트루드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트루드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Walsh nasceu em 1485, em Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Welsche, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret le Blount, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Alice Baynham em 1502, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1558, em Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Walsh родился в 1485 г. в местности шелсли валш, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Welsche было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret le Blount, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Alice Baynham в 1502 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1558 г. в местности строуд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности строуд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Walsh nació en 1485, en Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Welsche, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret le Blount, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Ann Alice Baynham en 1502, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1558, en Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
